# Phase 9 Meta-Consistency Plan

## Scope

Plan Phase 9.1.2 governance contradiction resolution and meta-consistency doctrine as documentation-only governance infrastructure.

## Deliverables

- Governance contradiction doctrine
- Constitutional consistency systems
- Meta-consistency governance
- Doctrine conflict resolution
- Authority conflict arbitration
- Constitutional tradeoff doctrine
- Governance coherence validation
- Legitimacy-containment balancing
- Governance paradox management
- Phase 9.1.2 meta-consistency summary

## Explicit Non-Goals

- runtime activation
- execution authorization
- provider execution
- deployment authorization
- orchestration activation
- infrastructure activation
- adapters
- fetch
- axios
- Prisma changes
- Supabase changes
- Twilio
- email execution
- credentials
- OAuth
- API keys
- background jobs
- autonomous communication
- autonomous governance
- execution-capable infrastructure

## Review Checklist

- Runtime activation does not exist.
- Provider execution does not exist.
- Orchestration activation does not exist.
- Deployment authority does not exist.
- Execution-capable infrastructure does not exist.
- Contradiction resolution creates no runtime authority.
- Consistency validation does not bypass constitutional supremacy.
- Doctrine reconciliation creates no hidden execution escalation.
- Coherence management creates no infrastructure activation authority.
- Meta-consistency does not weaken auditability.
